channel.title: Signal on Cryspen
channel.description: Recent content in Signal on Cryspen

item.title: Software Verification in Lean
item.description: This week in Paris, Cryspen is delighted to be co-hosting Software Verification in Lean 2026, a workshop and associated hackathon organized by the Beneficial AI Foundation and the Lean FRO.

item.title: Helping Secure Signal's Post-Quantum Transition
item.description: Signal just announced the deployment of their new post-quantum ratcheting protocol, called the Sparse Post-Quantum Ratchet (SPQR), and Cryspen is proud to have contributed to the formal analysis of the design and implementation of this new Signal feature.
